message:
test(proptest): add 16 property-based tests for semantic_anomaly_watchdog

Covers WatchdogConfig/WatchdogMetricsSnapshot/SemanticAnomalyEvent serde
roundtrips, ConformalShock/EntropyGateConfig/ConformalAnomalyConfig serde
roundtrips, watchdog segment filtering (min/max bytes), shedding under
queue pressure, metrics accounting, and config default invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
